name: Astro Planning Platform
description: Exposes Astro project, plan, and task management as OpenClaw gateway tools
author: Astro Anywhere

serverUrl.description: Base URL of the Astro backend API (e.g. http://localhost:3001 or https://api.yourdomain.com)

authToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the Astro API. Leave empty in local (no-auth) mode.

teamId.description: Active team ID to scope all API requests. Optional in single-user mode.

tools.name: astro_list_projects
tools.description: List all Astro projects visible to the authenticated user/team

tools.name: astro_get_plan
tools.description: Retrieve the full plan graph (nodes and edges) for a given project

tools.name: astro_run_task
tools.description: Dispatch a plan task for execution on a registered agent runner

tools.name: astro_task_status
tools.description: Get the current execution status and output for a dispatched task
